title: tournefortia cornifolia
intro: Tournefortia cornifolia, also known as the horned tournefortia, is a shrub-like plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tournefortia cornifolia include the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
